title: Skylands UpPort
description: Bring back the skylands! Skylands was an experimental world type introduced during Minecraft Beta 1.6–1.7.
body:
![get started](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7fd17334f710704feafa28897cc17b74c7225b0f.png)
**🏞️ Skylands UpPort**

Bring back the classic Skylands dimension — reimagined for modern Minecraft!
Skylands UpPort is a faithful recreation of Minecraft’s lost Skylands dimension — the mysterious floating world that once existed in early development snapshots. This mod brings it back to life in modern versions of Minecraft, enhanced with new features inspired by the Caves & Cliffs Update.
Explore vast floating islands, lush forests, and glowing caves high above the clouds. Experience unique terrain generation, and a peaceful atmosphere reminiscent of Minecraft’s earliest days — now updated with modern worldgen magic.
![line](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/527abaedd8b1e2895425af4e85b6aa6c18310531.png)
![portal](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/323b7db28d7cf9c0fd75521532837a3eba263d63_0.webp)

 Full frame (classic look): **14** prismarine bricks
 ![line](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/527abaedd8b1e2895425af4e85b6aa6c18310531.png)
 ![fether](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c3ac576821f6fc01c8a55e7409c3e872ce8acb07.png)
 
🟪**Required** item to turn on the portal

🌈 **A tribute to Minecraft history**

The Skylands were one of Minecraft’s earliest “prototype dimensions” — a world of floating islands that never made it to release.
Skylands UpPort restores that experience for today’s versions, keeping the nostalgia alive while adding modern polish and exploration value.

![skylands](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ddb8cdaebbf50b8c3815918c08ce74c51e67e892.png)
![skylands](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0e11b7e8d7ae35fa5e23edf96e53670b6c3ccfbc.png)

![line](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/527abaedd8b1e2895425af4e85b6aa6c18310531.png)

![intelij](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2f981cdb0f9bd8d718bf44ee4eb86d402e673891.png)

This mod have been created with IntelliJ
